github.note: Canonical repo: github.com/venkybobby/SARO (remote 'origin'). All PRs target venkybobby/SARO — never venkybobby/saro-platform (legacy mirror). Never create standalone repos or separate folders.

supabase-postgres.note: Production DB: Supabase PostgreSQL (canonical per docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, PT-012). Row-Level Security for tenant isolation. Stores compliance audit logs, drift records, user sessions. Neon is SUPERSEDED (migrated 2026-05-08).

slack.note: Team comms. Members: Alex Rivera (ML Lead), Jordan Lee (Backend Lead), Sam Patel (QA), Taylor Kim (QA).
